name: Banana-Crunch Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Beat bananas, sugar, and eggs together until light in texture. Stir in milk.
3. Add sifted dry ingredients (flour, salt, baking soda, and baking powder) and mix thoroughly.
4. Stir in melted butter, vanilla extract, and nuts.
5. Pour the batter into 1 standard or 2 smaller baking pans.
6. Bake for one hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the bread tests clean.
7. Allow the bread to cool thoroughly before slicing.
8. This recipe freezes well.
